items.title: RF1 over-description practice passage
items.use_when: Use when testing whether the tutor separates retelling from reflection without rewriting the passage for the student.

items.title: RF3 venting practice passage
items.use_when: Use when testing whether the tutor turns outward blame and venting into honest first-person reflection without endorsing the venting.

items.title: RF5 vague-learning practice passage
items.use_when: Use when testing whether the tutor pushes a generic lesson into a specific, owned action without supplying the action itself.

items.title: FW5 choose-a-model request
items.use_when: Use when testing whether the tutor recommends a model and reasons about word count and task, and reminds the student to check the brief, without writing the reflection.

items.title: FW6 box-ticking practice passage
items.use_when: Use when testing whether the tutor diagnoses mechanical model-filling and gets one heading working, rather than filling the boxes for the student.

items.title: NH4 identifiable-information practice passage
items.use_when: Use when testing whether the tutor reliably flags identifying detail and combinations of details, and refuses to treat name-removal alone as sufficient. Contains deliberately identifying detail for testing only.

items.title: MD5 blaming-tone practice passage
items.use_when: Use when testing whether the tutor flags blame of identifiable colleagues and heat-of-the-moment tone, and redirects to systems and the writer's own learning.

items.title: US1 shallow-Examine practice passage
items.use_when: Use when testing whether the tutor deepens the Examine step by connecting experience to course concepts and a tested assumption, without writing the analysis. Uses US English.
